debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ ∃ C, ∀ (x : ℝ), ‖f x‖ ≤ C

failed_attempts:
simp only [add_neg_cancel_left] at this
  -- f y is bounded by M
  have hy_in : y ∈ Set.Icc 0 l := ⟨hy0, hyl.le⟩
  have hfy : ‖f y‖ ≤ M := by
    apply hM
    exact ⟨⟨y, hy_in⟩, rfl⟩

    _ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f y - f x‖ := norm_sub_le_of_le (norm_nonneg _) le_rfl
    _ ≤ M + 1 := by linarith [norm_sub_rev (f y) (f x) ▸ this]

simp only [Set.mem_range, forall_exists_index, forall_apply_eq_imp_iff] at hM
  use M + 1
  intro x
  -- Find an almost period t such that x + t ∈ [0, l) (approximately)
  obtain ⟨y, ⟨hy0, hyl⟩, hxy⟩ := hl (-x)
  -- So -x + y is a 1-almost period, meaning ‖f(z + (-x + y)) - f(z)‖ ≤ 1 for all z
  have hap : IsLinftyAP 1 (-x + y) f := hxy
  -- Take z = x, then f(x + (-x + y)) = f(y) and ‖f(y) - f(x)‖ ≤ 1
  have key := hap x
  simp only [add_neg_cancel_left] at key
  -- y ∈ [0, l], so ‖f y‖ ≤ M
  have hy_bdd : ‖f y‖ ≤ M := by
    apply hM ⟨y, hy0, hyl.le⟩
  calc ‖f x‖ = ‖f y - (f y - f x)‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f y - f x‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
    _ ≤ M + 1 := by linarith [key]

simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ht
  specialize ht (z - y)
  simp only [sub_add_cancel] at ht
  calc ‖f z‖ = ‖f ((z - y) + y)‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f ((z - y) + y) - f (z - y)‖ + ‖f (z - y)‖ := norm_le_norm_add_norm_sub' _ _
    _ = ‖f (z - y + y) - f (z - y)‖ + ‖f (z - y)‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ 1 + M := by
      have key : -z + y ∈ {t | IsLinftyAP 1 t f} := ht
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, IsLinftyAP] at key
      have := key (z - y)
      simp only [sub_add_cancel, add_comm] at this
      gcongr
      · convert this using 2 <;> ring
      · have : z - y + (-z + y) = 0 := by ring
        simp [this]
        exact hM _ ⟨0, ⟨le_refl _, hl_pos.le⟩, rfl⟩
    _ ≤ M + 1 := by ring

specialize hap 0
  simp only [zero_add] at hap
  have : ‖f (x + y)‖ ≤ M := by

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf one_pos
  have hfc : Continuous f := hf.uniformContinuous.continuous
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := (isCompact_Icc (a := 0) (b := l)).exists_isMaxOn 
    (Set.nonempty_Icc.mpr hl.pos.le) (continuous_norm.comp hfc).continuousOn
  refine ⟨M + 1, fun x => ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨y, ⟨hy0, hyl⟩, hxy⟩ := hl (-x)

  have h1 : ‖f (y - x)‖ ≤ M := hM hyx
  have h2 : ‖f (x + (-x + y)) - f x‖ ≤ 1 := by convert hxy x using 2; ring
  calc ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f (y - x)‖ + ‖f x - f (y - x)‖ := norm_le_add_norm_add _ _
    _ = ‖f (y - x)‖ + ‖f (x + (-x + y)) - f x‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ M + 1 := by linarith

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf one_pos
  have huc := hf.uniformContinuous

    _ ≤ M + 1 := by linarith [hfy_norm.le, this]

    _ ≤ ‖f ((-x + y) + x) - f (-x + y)‖ + ‖f (-x + y)‖ := norm_add_le ..
    _ ≤ 1 + M := by linarith [hxy, hfy]
    _ = M + 1 := by ring

  intro x
  -- Find an almost period t such that -x + t ∈ [0, l)
  obtain ⟨y, ⟨hy0, hyl⟩, hy_mem⟩ := hl (-x)
  -- So -x + y is an ε-almost period, meaning ‖f(z + (-x + y)) - f(z)‖ ≤ 1 for all z
  have hap : IsLinftyAP 1 (-x + y) f := hy_mem
  -- In particular for z = x: ‖f(x + (-x + y)) - f(x)‖ ≤ 1, i.e., ‖f(y) - f(x)‖ ≤ 1
  have := hap x
  simp only [add_neg_cancel_left] at this
  -- We have 0 ≤ y < l, so y ∈ [0, l]
  have hy_Icc : y ∈ Set.Icc 0 l := ⟨hy0, hyl.le⟩
  have hfy : ‖f y‖ ≤ M := hM y hy0 hyl.le rfl
  calc ‖f x‖ = ‖f y - (f y - f x)‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f y - f x‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
    _ ≤ M + 1 := by linarith [this]

simp only [add_neg_cancel_left] at key
  have hy_mem : y ∈ Set.Icc 0 l := ⟨hy0, hyl.le⟩
  have := hM y hy_mem
  calc ‖f x‖ = ‖f y - (f y - f x)‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f y - f x‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
    _ = ‖f y‖ + ‖f (x + (-x + y)) - f x‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ M + 1 := by linarith [this, key]
